biography-text:
Hi there! My name is Carlos Eduardo Cardoso Barreiros, I am 20 years old and currently pursuing a Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science at Anhembi Morumbi University (expected graduation: December 2026). I am currently working as a Junior Database Administrator at Sintel Brasil, supporting production environments using SQL Server and PostgreSQL (on-premise and AWS Aurora).

In my day-to-day work, I focus on performance analysis and optimization, automation of database routines, backup and restore management, and monitoring of mission-critical systems. I also contribute to data modeling and the development of database solutions, always aiming for efficiency, reliability, and scalability.

My main strength is a continuous focus on automation and process improvement, building solutions that reduce manual errors, increase operational efficiency, and deliver tangible impact. I also collaborate closely with development teams to design and optimize procedures, functions, and queries, ensuring efficient integration between applications and databases.

Before transitioning into technology, I had the opportunity to work as a professional football player in Germany, where I developed discipline, resilience, teamwork, and adaptability in challenging environments, while also strengthening my English skills.

I have a strong interest in Data Engineering and Artificial Intelligence applied to data, and I am continuously expanding my knowledge in these areas. I aim to grow in building scalable data solutions, from data modeling and processing to data delivery for analysis, leveraging modern technologies and engineering best practices. I believe in the power of data to drive real impact, enabling efficiency, scalability, and better decision-making within organizations.
onefootball-text:
This was also a college project, but more theoretical in nature. It involved modeling an improvement to the OneFootball app, specifically creating a community area in the app where users could interact with news content. The main focus of development of this project was Data Modeling, using UML (Unified Modeling Language), for the diagrams and Requirements Engineering, for the implementations.

technologies used: UML and Requiriments Engineering
crud-text:
A complete web application that simulates a user registration and management system, developed as a personal challenge to deepen knowledge in full-stack development. The system allows users to register, log in, view their information, and delete their accounts. For moderators, there is a panel with full control features over users, including registration, editing, and deletion.

technologies used: React, CSS Tailwind, Node.js, Express and MySQL
footer-message: Developed by Carlos Barreiros. © 2024 All Rights Reserved.
thanks-message: I will get back to you soon :)
